mapper.sql: VISIT_DATE, VISIT_NO, DIAG_CODE, DOCTOR, PATIENT_ID, DIAG_DESC, PENDING, CUSTOM, DIAG_CLASS, DIAGNOSIS_TIME, POSTFIX, DIAGNOSIS_NO
mapper.insert:
insert into OUTP_DIAGNOSIS_YB
VISIT_DATE,
VISIT_NO,
DIAG_CODE,
DOCTOR,
PATIENT_ID,
DIAG_DESC,
PENDING,
CUSTOM,
DIAG_CLASS,
DIAGNOSIS_TIME,
POSTFIX,
DIAGNOSIS_NO,

#{visitNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC},

#{doctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{diagDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
